# Nexconn Documentation

> Developer documentation for chat, call, and server APIs from Nexconn.

- [Build chat, calling, and server workflows with Nexconn](/index.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.


## Call SDK for Android

- [Make your first call](/callsdk-android.md): Make your first call in Nexconn Call SDK for Android, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.
- [Audio routing](/callsdk-android/audio-route.md): Audio routing in Nexconn Call SDK for Android, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.
- [Status codes](/callsdk-android/code.md): Reference Nexconn Call SDK for Android status codes to understand return values, diagnose failures, and troubleshoot integration issues.
- [Group call](/callsdk-android/group-call.md): Group call in Nexconn Call SDK for Android, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.
- [Integrate with chat](/callsdk-android/integrate-with-chat.md): Integrate with chat in Nexconn Call SDK for Android, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.
- [1-to-1 call](/callsdk-android/one-to-one-call.md): 1-to-1 call in Nexconn Call SDK for Android, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.
- [Configure push settings](/callsdk-android/push-config.md): Configure push settings in Nexconn Call SDK for Android, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.
- [Release notes](/callsdk-android/release-notes.md): Review Nexconn Call SDK for Android release notes, including version updates, fixes, behavior changes, and upgrade considerations.

## Call SDK for iOS

- [Make your first call](/callsdk-ios.md): Make your first call in Nexconn Call SDK for iOS, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.

- [Status codes](/callsdk-ios/code.md): Reference Nexconn Call SDK for iOS status codes to understand return values, diagnose failures, and troubleshoot integration issues.
- [Group call](/callsdk-ios/group-call.md): Group call in Nexconn Call SDK for iOS, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.
- [Integrate with chat](/callsdk-ios/integrate-with-chat.md): Integrate with chat in Nexconn Call SDK for iOS, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.
- [1-to-1 call](/callsdk-ios/one-to-one-call.md): 1-to-1 call in Nexconn Call SDK for iOS, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.
- [Configure push settings](/callsdk-ios/push-config.md): Configure push settings in Nexconn Call SDK for iOS, including call setup, media handling, and integration behavior.
- [Release notes](/callsdk-ios/release-notes.md): Review Nexconn Call SDK for iOS release notes, including version updates, fixes, behavior changes, and upgrade considerations.

## Chat SDK for Android

- [Send your first message](/chatsdk-android.md): Send your first message in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including setup, usage, and platform-specific behavior.
- [Status codes](/chatsdk-android/code.md): Reference Nexconn Chat SDK for Android status codes to understand return values, diagnose failures, and troubleshoot integration issues.
- [Creating community channels](/chatsdk-android/community-channels/creating-channel.md): Create a community channel in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including channel structure, permissions, and messaging workflows.
- [Community channel overview](/chatsdk-android/community-channels/overview.md): Overview of community channels in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including core concepts, capabilities, and the main implementation workflows.
- [Community channel service configuration](/chatsdk-android/community-channels/platform-config.md): Community channel service configuration in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including channel structure, permissions, and messaging workflows.

- [Retrieving community subchannels](/chatsdk-android/community-channels/retrieving-channels.md): Use the client SDK to retrieve subchannels within a community channel in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android.
- [User groups](/chatsdk-android/community-channels/user-group-about.md): User groups in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including channel structure, permissions, and messaging workflows.
- [Connect to server](/chatsdk-android/connection/connect.md): Connect in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including connection flow, reconnection, and status handling.
- [Disconnect](/chatsdk-android/connection/disconnect.md): Disconnect in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including connection flow, reconnection, and status handling.
- [Monitor connection status](/chatsdk-android/connection/monitor-status.md): Monitor connection status in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including connection flow, reconnection, and status handling.
- [Multi-device message sync](/chatsdk-android/connection/multiple-client-sync-config.md): Multi-device message sync in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including connection flow, reconnection, and status handling.
- [Multi-device login](/chatsdk-android/connection/multiple-platform.md): Multi-device login in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including connection flow, reconnection, and status handling.
- [Reconnection and device conflict](/chatsdk-android/connection/reconnect-kick.md): Reconnection and device conflict in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including connection flow, reconnection, and status handling.
- [Deleting channels](/chatsdk-android/direct-system-channels/deleting-channel.md): Delete a channel in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including channel organization, sync, and message handling.
- [Managing channel tag data](/chatsdk-android/direct-system-channels/manage-tag-data.md): Manage tag data in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including channel organization, sync, and message handling.
- [Channel overview](/chatsdk-android/direct-system-channels/overview.md): Overview of direct system channels in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including core concepts, capabilities, and the main implementation workflows.
- [Pinning channels](/chatsdk-android/direct-system-channels/pinning-channel.md): Pin a channel in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including channel organization, sync, and message handling.
- [Retrieving channels](/chatsdk-android/direct-system-channels/retrieving-channels.md): Retrieve direct system channels in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including channel organization, sync, and message handling.
- [Tagging channels](/chatsdk-android/direct-system-channels/tagging-channels.md): Tag channels in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including channel organization, sync, and message handling.

- [Listen for database upgrade status](/chatsdk-android/event-handlers/database-upgrade-handler.md): Database events in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including callbacks, lifecycle events, and implementation flow.

- [Retrieving group channels](/chatsdk-android/group-channels/retrieving-channels.md): The channel retrieval APIs for group channels work the same as for direct channels in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android.

- [Get open channel info](/chatsdk-android/open-channels/retrieve-channel-info.md): The current Android SDK does not expose openChannel.getInfo() in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android.
- [Report push analytics](/chatsdk-android/push/get-push-stats.md): Report push analytics in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including setup, provider integration, testing, and delivery behavior.
- [Handle push notification clicks](/chatsdk-android/push/handle-push-notification-click.md): Handle push notification clicks in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including setup, provider integration, testing, and delivery behavior.

- [Push notifications overview](/chatsdk-android/push/overview.md): Overview of push notifications in Nexconn Chat SDK for Android, including core concepts, capabilities, and the main implementation workflows.
- [Release notes](/chatsdk-android/release-notes.md): Review Nexconn Chat SDK for Android release notes, including version updates, fixes, behavior changes, and upgrade considerations.

## Chat SDK for Flutter

- [Send your first message](/chatsdk-flutter.md): Send your first message in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including setup, usage, and platform-specific behavior.
- [Status codes](/chatsdk-flutter/code.md): Reference Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter status codes to understand return values, diagnose failures, and troubleshoot integration issues.
- [Create a community channel](/chatsdk-flutter/community-channels/creating-channel.md): Create a community channel in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including channel structure, permissions, and messaging workflows.
- [Delete messages](/chatsdk-flutter/community-channels/delete-message.md): Delete messages in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including channel structure, permissions, and messaging workflows.
- [Do not disturb overview](/chatsdk-flutter/community-channels/do-not-disturb-about.md): Overview of community channels in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including core concepts, capabilities, and the main implementation workflows.
- [Set DND by subchannel](/chatsdk-flutter/community-channels/do-not-disturb-by-channel-id.md): Set DND by subchannel in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including channel structure, permissions, and messaging workflows.
- [Set default DND level](/chatsdk-flutter/community-channels/do-not-disturb-default.md): Set default DND level in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including channel structure, permissions, and messaging workflows.
- [Manage message metadata](/chatsdk-flutter/community-channels/expand-message.md): Manage message metadata in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including channel structure, permissions, and messaging workflows.
- [Get message history](/chatsdk-flutter/community-channels/get-history-message.md): Retrieve message history from a community subchannel using BaseChannel.createMessagesQuery() in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter.
- [Community channel overview](/chatsdk-flutter/community-channels/overview.md): Overview of community channels in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including core concepts, capabilities, and the main implementation workflows.

- [Get subchannels](/chatsdk-flutter/community-channels/retrieving-channels.md): Retrieve the list of subchannels under a community channel by calling community.getSubChannels() in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter.

- [Set DND by channel type](/chatsdk-flutter/notification/do-not-disturb-by-type.md): Set DND by channel type in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including notification controls, scope, and sync behavior.
- [Get open channel history](/chatsdk-flutter/open-channels/get-history-messages.md): Retrieving remote open channel history requires the **Open channel cloud message storage** service in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter.
- [Join an open channel](/chatsdk-flutter/open-channels/joining-channel.md): Join an open channel in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including channel access, metadata, and event handling.
- [Leave an open channel](/chatsdk-flutter/open-channels/leaving-channel.md): Leave an open channel in Nexconn Chat SDK for Flutter, including channel access, metadata, and event handling.

- [Join an open channel](/chatsdk-web/open-channel/join.md): Join an open channel in Nexconn Chat SDK for Web, including channel access, metadata, and event handling.
- [Monitor open channel events](/chatsdk-web/open-channel/monitor-events.md): Monitor open channel events in Nexconn Chat SDK for Web, including channel access, metadata, and event handling.
- [Manage open channel metadata](/chatsdk-web/open-channel/open-channel-kv.md): Open channel metadata in Nexconn Chat SDK for Web, including channel access, metadata, and event handling.
- [Open channel overview](/chatsdk-web/open-channel/overview.md): Overview of open channels in Nexconn Chat SDK for Web, including core concepts, capabilities, and the main implementation workflows.
- [Leave an open channel](/chatsdk-web/open-channel/quit.md): Leave an open channel in Nexconn Chat SDK for Web, including channel access, metadata, and event handling.
- [Open channel service configuration](/chatsdk-web/open-channel/service-config.md): Open channel service configuration in Nexconn Chat SDK for Web, including channel access, metadata, and event handling.
- [Release notes](/chatsdk-web/release-notes.md): Review Nexconn Chat SDK for Web release notes, including version updates, fixes, behavior changes, and upgrade considerations.
- [Manage friends](/chatsdk-web/user/friend-manager.md): Manage friends in Nexconn Chat SDK for Web, including profiles, relationships, and presence behavior.
- [User overview](/chatsdk-web/user/overview.md): Overview of user features in Nexconn Chat SDK for Web, including core concepts, capabilities, and the main implementation workflows.
- [Subscribe to online status](/chatsdk-web/user/subscribe_online.md): Subscribe to online status in Nexconn Chat SDK for Web, including profiles, relationships, and presence behavior.
- [Manage user profiles](/chatsdk-web/user/user_profiles.md): Manage user profiles in Nexconn Chat SDK for Web, including profiles, relationships, and presence behavior.

## Chat UI SDK for Android

- [Send your first message](/chatui-android.md): Send your first message with Nexconn Chat UI SDK for Android, including setup, initialization, connection, and channel pages.
- [Android OS version compatibility](/chatui-android/android-os-version.md): Configure android os version compatibility for Chat UI SDK for Android in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Configuration guide](/chatui-android/chatui-config-guide.md): Configure configuration guide for Chat UI SDK for Android in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Status Codes](/chatui-android/code.md): Configure status codes for Chat UI SDK for Android in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Connect](/chatui-android/connection/connect.md): Configure connect for connection management in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Disconnect](/chatui-android/connection/disconnect.md): Configure disconnect for connection management in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Connection status](/chatui-android/connection/monitor-status.md): Configure connection status for connection management in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Development guide](/chatui-android/connection/multiple-client-sync-config.md): Configure multi-device message synchronization for connection management in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Multi-platform login](/chatui-android/connection/multiple-platform.md): Configure multiple platform for connection management in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Reconnection and kick policy](/chatui-android/connection/reconnect-kick.md): Configure reconnection and kick policy for connection management in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Delete channels](/chatui-android/customization/conversation-delete.md): Remove one or more channels from the Chat UI SDK for Android channel list without deleting message history.
- [Get channels](/chatui-android/customization/conversation-get.md): Configure get channels for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Customize channel list data processing](/chatui-android/customization/conversation-list-data-processor.md): Configure customize channel list data processing for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Sync channel pin and Do Not Disturb status across clients](/chatui-android/customization/conversation-share-status-between-clients.md): Configure sync channel pin and do not disturb status across clients for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Customize message long-click menu](/chatui-android/customization/customize-message-long-click.md): Configure customize message long-click menu for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Custom message types](/chatui-android/customization/message-customize.md): Configure custom message types for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Delete messages](/chatui-android/customization/message-delete.md): Configure delete messages for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Retrieve message history](/chatui-android/customization/message-get-history.md): Configure retrieve message history for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Insert messages](/chatui-android/customization/message-insert.md): Configure insert messages for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Intercept messages](/chatui-android/customization/message-intercept.md): Configure intercept messages for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Receive messages](/chatui-android/customization/message-receive.md): Configure receive messages for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Search messages](/chatui-android/customization/message-search.md): Configure search messages for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Send messages](/chatui-android/customization/message-send.md): Configure send messages for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Customize permission request handling](/chatui-android/customization/request-permissions.md): Configure customize permission request handling for Chat UI customization in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Theme customization](/chatui-android/customization/theme-customization.md): Configure light, dark, and custom themes in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Delete messages for everyone](/chatui-android/features/delete.md): Configure deleting messages for everyone in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Channel Draft](/chatui-android/features/draft.md): Configure channel draft for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Edit Message](/chatui-android/features/edit_message.md): Configure edit message for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [File messages](/chatui-android/features/file-message.md): Configure file messages for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Image and GIF messages](/chatui-android/features/image-gif-message.md): Configure image and gif messages for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Forward messages](/chatui-android/features/message-forward.md): Configure forward messages for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Message mentions](/chatui-android/features/message-mention.md): Configure message mentions for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Per-message read receipts](/chatui-android/features/message-receipt.md): Configure per-message read receipts for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Message reference](/chatui-android/features/message-reference.md): Configure message reference for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [User online status](/chatui-android/features/online-status.md): Configure user online status for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Quick reply](/chatui-android/features/quick-reply.md): Set up quick reply for Chat UI SDK for Android with the required steps and next actions.
- [Short video messages](/chatui-android/features/sight-message.md): Configure short video messages for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Pin Channels](/chatui-android/features/stick-to-top.md): Configure pin channels for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Typing status](/chatui-android/features/typing-status.md): Configure typing status for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Unread count](/chatui-android/features/unread.md): Configure unread count for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Voice messages](/chatui-android/features/voice-message.md): Configure voice messages for Chat UI feature in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Import the SDK](/chatui-android/import.md): Integrate Chat UI SDK for Android into your project using Maven or local module.
- [Page customization design](/chatui-android/info-entrust/arch_overview.md): Customize profile and relationship management pages in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Friend Request List Page](/chatui-android/info-entrust/entrust-application.md): Configure friend request list page.

- [Group manager page](/chatui-android/info-entrust/entrust-group-managers.md): Configure group manager page.
- [Group notification page](/chatui-android/info-entrust/entrust-group-notification.md): Configure group notification page.
- [Group Owner Transfer Page](/chatui-android/info-entrust/entrust-group-tranfer.md): Configure group owner transfer page.
- [My groups page](/chatui-android/info-entrust/entrust-mygroup.md): Configure my groups page.
- [Profile and relationship management](/chatui-android/info-entrust/entrust-overview.md): Understand how Chat UI SDK for Android manages profile and relationship data, including the default Nexconn-hosted mode and app-managed mode.
- [Friend search page](/chatui-android/info-entrust/entrust-search-user.md): Configure friend search page.
- [Add friend page](/chatui-android/info-entrust/entrust-search-user-by-id.md): Configure add friend page.
- [User Profile Page](/chatui-android/info-entrust/entrust-user.md): Configure user profile page.
- [Initialization](/chatui-android/init.md): Initialize the Chat UI SDK with NCChatUI and establish a connection.
- [Aggregate channels by type](/chatui-android/key-functions/aggregate-conversations.md): Configure aggregate channels by type for Chat UI screen integration in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Channel screen](/chatui-android/key-functions/conversation.md): Configure channel screen for Chat UI screen integration in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Channel list page](/chatui-android/key-functions/conversation-list.md): Configure channel list page for Chat UI screen integration in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Customize message item display](/chatui-android/key-functions/customize-message-item.md): Configure customize message item display for Chat UI screen integration in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Input area](/chatui-android/key-functions/input.md): Configure input area for Chat UI screen integration in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Listen to page events](/chatui-android/key-functions/listener.md): Configure listen to page events for Chat UI screen integration in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Development guide](/chatui-android/moderation/overview.md): Understand moderation overview for Chat UI SDK for Android, including scope, behavior, and related tasks.
- [Development guide](/chatui-android/moderation/sensitive.md): Configure sensitive content interception callback for content moderation in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Set channel do not disturb](/chatui-android/notification/by-conversation.md): Configure set channel do not disturb for notification and do not disturb in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Set global Do Not Disturb by time range](/chatui-android/notification/by-time-range.md): Configure set global do not disturb by time range for notification and do not disturb in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Local notifications](/chatui-android/notification/customize-notification-local.md): Configure local notifications for notification and do not disturb in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Intercept toast messages](/chatui-android/notification/intercept-toast.md): Configure intercept toast messages for notification and do not disturb in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [ProGuard](/chatui-android/proguard.md): Configure proguard for Chat UI SDK for Android in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Report Push Data](/chatui-android/push/get-push-stats.md): Configure report push data for push notification in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [FCM push integration](/chatui-android/push/integration/fcm.md): Configure fcm push integration for push provider integration in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Huawei push integration](/chatui-android/push/integration/huawei.md): Configure huawei push integration for push provider integration in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Integrate push](/chatui-android/push/integration/summary.md): Configure integrate push for push provider integration in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Push Service Overview](/chatui-android/push/overview.md): Understand push service overview for Chat UI SDK for Android, including scope, behavior, and related tasks.
- [Release notes](/chatui-android/release-notes.md): Review the latest Chat UI SDK for Android release notes, including capabilities and upgrade notes.
- [Group information](/chatui-android/user/group-info.md): Provide and cache group names and avatars in Chat UI SDK for Android by using NCUserInfoManager and GroupInfoProvider.
- [Group member list](/chatui-android/user/group-member.md): Provide group member data for mentions and group call member pickers in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Group channel overview](/chatui-android/user/group-overview.md): Understand group pages, group channels, and group data responsibilities in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [Group Member User Information](/chatui-android/user/group-userinfo.md): Provide and cache group member nicknames in Chat UI SDK for Android by using NCUserInfoManager and GroupUserInfoProvider.
- [Monitor user data changes](/chatui-android/user/monitor-user-data.md): Register UserDataObserver callbacks to monitor user, group, and group member profile changes in Chat UI SDK for Android.
- [User overview](/chatui-android/user/overview.md): Understand user overview for Chat UI SDK for Android, including scope, behavior, and related tasks.
- [User information](/chatui-android/user/userinfo.md): Provide and cache user nicknames and avatars from your app in Chat UI SDK for Android by using NCUserInfoManager and UserDataProvider.

## Chat UI SDK for Flutter

- [Send your first message](/chatui-flutter.md): Initialize Nexconn Chat UI SDK for Flutter, connect a user, and open the default chat screens.
- [Architecture](/chatui-flutter/arch.md): Architecture overview for Nexconn Chat UI SDK for Flutter.
- [Configuration guide](/chatui-flutter/chatui-config-guide.md): Configure pages, input, bubbles, profiles, and theme in Nexconn Chat UI SDK for Flutter.
- [Error codes](/chatui-flutter/code.md): Reference for NCError codes returned by Nexconn Chat UI SDK for Flutter provider operations.
- [Customization overview](/chatui-flutter/customization.md): Overview of config and builder customization layers available in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Channel page builders](/chatui-flutter/customization/builder/channel-page.md): Replace the app bar, channel rows, empty state, or partial row sections in ChannelPage using builder callbacks.
- [Chat page builders](/chatui-flutter/customization/builder/chat-page.md): Replace the app bar, message rows, header, footer, or empty state in ChatPage using builder callbacks.
- [Custom message bubble builders](/chatui-flutter/customization/builder/message-bubble.md): Replace the content widget for specific message types using customMessageBubbleBuilders in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Bubble config](/chatui-flutter/customization/config/bubble.md): Configure message bubble colors, text styles, corner radius, and avatar shape using BubbleConfig in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Channel page config](/chatui-flutter/customization/config/channel-page.md): Configure the channel list app bar, list behavior, item display, swipe actions, and long-press menu using ChannelConfig in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Chat page config](/chatui-flutter/customization/config/chat-page.md): Configure the app bar, message list, input area, bubble style, long-press menu, and message hooks in ChatPage using ChatPageConfig.
- [Message input config](/chatui-flutter/customization/config/input.md): Configure the input area toolbar, extension plugins, emoji panel, mention hooks, voice recording, and permission handling in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [FAQ](/chatui-flutter/faq.md): Troubleshooting guide for common Nexconn Chat UI SDK for Flutter integration issues.
- [Pinning channels](/chatui-flutter/features/channel-pin.md): Pin and unpin channels to keep important conversations near the top of the channel list in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Delete message for everyone](/chatui-flutter/features/delete-message-for-all.md): Nexconn Chat UI exposes deleting a message for everyone through ChatProvider.deleteMessageForAll. The default long-press menu shows this action only for sent messages that can be deleted for everyone by the current user and current SDK state.
- [Channel drafts](/chatui-flutter/features/draft.md): Automatically save and restore unsent text drafts per channel using ChatProvider in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [File messages](/chatui-flutter/features/file-message.md): Send, display, and preview file messages using ChatProvider and FilePreviewPage in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Image and GIF messages](/chatui-flutter/features/image-gif-message.md): Send, display, and preview image and GIF messages using ChatProvider and PhotoPreviewPage in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Forwarding messages](/chatui-flutter/features/message-forward.md): Forward selected messages individually or as a combined history to another channel using ChatProvider in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Mentions](/chatui-flutter/features/message-mention.md): Enable @mention support in group channels using mentionResolver or mentionPicker in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Reference replies](/chatui-flutter/features/message-reference.md): Send reference replies that include a preview of the quoted message using ReferenceMessage in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Short video messages](/chatui-flutter/features/short-video-message.md): Send, display, and preview short video messages using ChatProvider and ShortVideoPreviewPage in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Unread counts](/chatui-flutter/features/unread.md): Display and manage channel unread counts, mention counts, and total unread badges in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Voice messages](/chatui-flutter/features/voice-message.md): Record, send, and play back voice messages using the built-in recorder or a custom recorder in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Import the SDK](/chatui-flutter/import.md): Add Nexconn Chat UI SDK to a Flutter project.
- [Initialization](/chatui-flutter/init.md): Initialize and connect Nexconn Chat UI SDK for Flutter.
- [Channel list](/chatui-flutter/key-functions/channel-list.md): Build a channel list with ChannelPage, ChannelProvider, and BaseChannel.
- [Chat page](/chatui-flutter/key-functions/chat-page.md): Build a message screen with ChatPage, ChatProvider, and BaseChannel.
- [Input area](/chatui-flutter/key-functions/input.md): Configure the ChatPage input area with MessageInputConfig.
- [Events and listeners](/chatui-flutter/key-functions/listener.md): Listen to EngineProvider, ChannelProvider, and ChatProvider updates.
- [Channel Do Not Disturb](/chatui-flutter/notification/by-channel.md): Mute and unmute channels to control alert behavior without blocking message delivery in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Local notifications](/chatui-flutter/notification/local-notification.md): Show in-process local notifications for new messages using the built-in flutter_local_notifications helper in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [Release notes](/chatui-flutter/release-notes.md): Release notes for Nexconn Chat UI SDK for Flutter, including version history, compatibility, and known issues.
- [Group information](/chatui-flutter/user/group-info.md): Load group details, manage members, and customize group operations using GroupProvider in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.
- [User profiles](/chatui-flutter/user/userinfo.md): Display user names and avatars in chat and channel list using ChatProfileInfo and NexconnUserProfileProvider in Nexconn Chat UI for Flutter.

## Chat UI SDK for iOS

- [Quickstart](/chatui-ios.md): This guide helps you integrate Chat UI iOS into your app. You'll learn how to import the SDK, initialize it, connect users, display channel lists and message views, and test message delivery.
- [Configuration guide](/chatui-ios/chatui-config-guide.md): Chat UI provides global configuration options for various features to help you quickly build a chat application.
- [Status codes](/chatui-ios/code.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Establish a connection](/chatui-ios/connection/connect.md): Before using Chat UI SDK's messaging features, your client application must establish a successful connection to the instant messaging service.
- [Disconnect from Chat UI](/chatui-ios/connection/disconnect.md): Disconnect from the Chat SDK when your app needs to switch user accounts or log out. The SDK lets you control whether to allow push notifications after disconnection.
- [Monitor connection status](/chatui-ios/connection/monitor-status.md): The Chat UI SDK provides the NCChatUIConnectionStatusDelegate protocol to monitor IM connection status changes. By listening to these changes, your app can handle different business logic or display status notifications.
- [Developer guide](/chatui-ios/connection/multiple-client-sync-config.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Multiple device simultaneous login](/chatui-ios/connection/multiple-platform.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Reconnection mechanism and reconnection kick strategy](/chatui-ios/connection/reconnect-kick.md): Automatic reconnection mechanism
- [Delete a channel](/chatui-ios/customization/conversation-delete.md): Chat UI's channel list implements swipe-to-delete functionality by default.
- [Get channels](/chatui-ios/customization/conversation-get.md): The Chat UI SDK provides complete channel retrieval and display logic by default. When using the default channel list and channel view, you don't need to call additional channel-related APIs. If the default implementation doesn't meet your requirements, you can use these NCBaseChannel APIs from the Chat SDK:
- [Custom message types](/chatui-ios/customization/message-customize.md): Chat UI supports custom message types (distinct from built-in types) and allows modifying how both built-in and custom message types appear in the Chat UI SDK channel view.
- [Delete messages](/chatui-ios/customization/message-delete.md): Chat UI's channel page implements long-press-to-delete functionality by default, supporting both local-only message deletion and synchronized deletion of messages from both local and remote storage.
- [Insert messages](/chatui-ios/customization/message-insert.md): The message insertion API does not send messages to the remote server, so inserted messages won't be synced to the local database when reinstalling the app or logging in from another device.
- [Intercept messages](/chatui-ios/customization/message-intercept.md): The Chat UI SDK allows intercepting messages before sending, after sending, and upon receiving.
- [Receive messages](/chatui-ios/customization/message-receive.md): You can listen to messages received by the SDK through message event observers or message policy delegates, then perform corresponding business operations.
- [Send messages](/chatui-ios/customization/message-send.md): Chat UI's built-in channel pages provide functionality and UI for sending various message types (some message types require plugin support). When you need to send messages in custom pages, use the message sending methods in the Chat UI core class NCChatUI. These methods not only send messages but also trigger updates in Chat UI's built-in pages.
- [Message multi-selection](/chatui-ios/customization/multi-select.md): Chat UI channel pages support long-press message multi-selection functionality.
- [Channel drafts](/chatui-ios/features/draft.md): Chat UI supports channel draft functionality.
- [Edit messages](/chatui-ios/features/edit-message.md): Chat UI supports message editing, allowing users to modify their successfully sent messages.
- [Emoji](/chatui-ios/features/emoticon.md): You can send emoji expressions in the Chat UI input area. Tap the emoji (☺) button in the input bar to expand the emoji panel, which supports sending emoji expressions. Emoji messages will appear in the message list component of the channel page.
- [File messages](/chatui-ios/features/file-message.md): You can send file messages using the built-in file plugin in Chat UI. These messages will appear in the message list component of the channel page. By default, the file plugin sends messages containing the file message content object NCFileMessage .
- [Image and GIF messages](/chatui-ios/features/image-gif-message.md): Users can send image and GIF messages through the built-in image plugin in Chat UI. These messages appear in the message list component of the channel page. The SDK sends messages containing the following content objects by default:
- [Forward messages](/chatui-ios/features/message-forward.md): Chat UI supports forwarding single messages and provides two forwarding modes for multiple messages: individual forwarding and combined forwarding. Users can forward messages from a channel to other channels. Forwarded messages will appear in the message list component of the target channel.
- [Message mentions](/chatui-ios/features/message-mention.md): Mentions (@) are a common feature in group channels that allow you to notify specific users or all group members within a channel, enhancing message visibility. When using the mention feature, the message content includes an additional [NCMentionedInfo] object. Chat UI enables mentions by default.
- [Per-message read receipts](/chatui-ios/features/message-receipt.md): - New AppKeys automatically enable per-message read receipts, making the legacy channel-level read receipts obsolete.
- [Message reference and reply](/chatui-ios/features/message-reference.md): Chat UI supports message reference and reply functionality, allowing users to reply to specific messages within a channel. Referenced messages appear in the message list component of the channel view. By default, the reference feature sends messages containing a [NCReferenceMessage] object. Use NCMessageType.reference when you need the message type identifier.
- [User online status](/chatui-ios/features/online-status.md): Feature description
- [Sight message](/chatui-ios/features/sight-message.md): Users can send sight messages through the Chat UI gallery (local photo album) or the sight plugin. These messages appear in the message list component of the channel page. By default, the plugin sends messages containing the sight message content object NCShortVideoMessage .
- [Pin a channel](/chatui-ios/features/stick-to-top.md): Chat UI supports displaying pinned channels at the top of the channel list.
- [Stream messages](/chatui-ios/features/stream-message.md): Chat UI supports stream messages for continuous message delivery from the server.
- [Theme customization](/chatui-ios/features/theme-customization.md): Chat UI supports theme customization. The current iOS SDK exposes one built-in theme (Lively) and allows creating custom themes based on it.
- [Typing status](/chatui-ios/features/typing-status.md): The typing status feature provides visual feedback when other users are composing messages. When a user is typing, the title bar displays "User is typing" until the message is sent or the text is completely deleted.
- [Unread message count](/chatui-ios/features/unread.md): The unread message count is a default Chat UI feature that shows users the number of unread messages in each channel.
- [Voice messages](/chatui-ios/features/voice-message.md): Users can record and send voice messages through Chat UI's built-in input component. The messages appear in the message list component of the channel view. By default, the SDK generates and sends messages containing high-definition voice message objects NCHDVoiceMessage .
- [Import the SDK](/chatui-ios/import.md): You can import Chat UI iOS using one of the following methods:
- [Friend request list page](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-application.md): The friend request list page displays all friend requests on the current user's device. When the user opens this page, Chat UI automatically retrieves friend request data from the database and sorts it chronologically.
- [Contacts list page](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-contact.md): The contacts list page displays all contacts for the current user's device. When the user opens this page, Chat UI retrieves contact information from the database and sorts it alphabetically by contact name, using the remark name if available.
- [Group channel pages](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-group.md): Group channel pages include contact selection, group creation, group settings, and member list management.
- [Group member follow list page](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-group-follows.md): When do not disturb mode is enabled for a channel, you can still receive remote push notifications for messages sent by group members in your follow list.
- [Group management page](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-group-management.md): The group management page class is NCGroupManagementViewController.
- [Group managers page](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-group-managers.md): The group managers page class is NCGroupManagerListController
- [Group notification page](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-group-notification.md): The group notification list page displays group notifications received by the current user. When entering this page, the SDK automatically loads group information from the database.
- [Group owner transfer page](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-group-transfer.md): The group owner transfer page class is NCGroupTransferViewController
- [My groups page](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-mygroup.md): The my groups page displays all group channels the current user has joined. When the user opens this page, Chat UI automatically retrieves group information from the database.
- [Information management overview](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-overview.md): Information management introduction
- [Search my groups](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-search-mygroups.md): The search my groups page retrieves group channels that the current user has joined. When entering keywords in the search field, the Chat UI SDK fetches matching group information from the database.
- [Search for friends](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-search-user.md): The search friends page retrieves all friends from the current user's device. When the user enters keywords in the search field, Chat UI fetches friend information from the database.
- [Add contacts](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-search-user-by-id.md): The add contacts page lets users search for other users by their application ID. When users enter an ID in the search field and tap search, the Chat UI SDK retrieves the user information from the server. Chat UI provides NCUserSearchViewController, a search page class based on UIKit's UITableView.
- [User profile page](/chatui-ios/info-entrust/entrust-user.md): The user profile page displays basic user information. When opened, the SDK retrieves and shows user data from the database. Chat UI provides NCProfileViewController, a profile page class based on UIKit's UITableView, which differentiates between current user and other user profiles by initializing with different view models.
- [Initialize the SDK](/chatui-ios/init.md): Initialize the SDK before you use any other Chat UI feature.
- [Internationalization](/chatui-ios/internationalization.md): The Chat UI SDK supports three languages by default: Simplified Chinese, English, and Arabic.
- [Channel view](/chatui-ios/key-functions/conversation.md): The channel view serves as the primary chat interface in the application, composed of two main components: the message list and the input area. Chat UI provides the NCChannelViewController class, which implements the channel view based on UIKit's UIViewController.
- [Channel list page](/chatui-ios/key-functions/conversation-list.md): The Chat UI SDK generates channels based on messages in the local database. The channel list page displays all local channels from the current user's device. When the SDK's local message database generates a message, the SDK automatically creates the corresponding channel and sorts them in reverse chronological order, with pinned channels appearing first.
- [Customize message display styles](/chatui-ios/key-functions/customize-message-item.md): The Chat UI SDK controls message display styles in channels through message display templates. All message templates in Chat UI inherit from NCMessageCell. You can modify the display template for specific message types to achieve personalized message styling.
- [Input area](/chatui-ios/key-functions/input.md): The Chat UI input area is managed by NCChatSessionInputBarControl, which integrates text input, voice, emoji, extension panels, and @mentions by default.
- [Page event listeners](/chatui-ios/key-functions/listener.md): Chat UI provides two types of listeners:
- [Developer guide](/chatui-ios/moderation/overview.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Developer guide](/chatui-ios/moderation/sensitive.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Set do not disturb for channels](/chatui-ios/notification/by-conversation.md): - This document describes how to set do not disturb using Chat SDK.
- [Set global do not disturb](/chatui-ios/notification/by-time-range.md): The client can configure a silent notification time window to implement global do not disturb functionality. This feature sets a recurring daily time window that remains effective until modified or removed.
- [Local notifications](/chatui-ios/notification/customize-notification-local.md): Chat UI provides built-in local notification creation and display behavior to help developers quickly implement application features.
- [Integrate APNs remote push notifications](/chatui-ios/push/apns.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Configure push notifications per user](/chatui-ios/push/config-by-app-user.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Customize remote push notification sounds](/chatui-ios/push/customize-apns.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Report push notification statistics](/chatui-ios/push/get-push-stats.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Configure message push properties](/chatui-ios/push/msg-pushconfig.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Customize multilingual push templates](/chatui-ios/push/push-template.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Test APNs remote push](/chatui-ios/push/test-push.md): Developer documentation for chat, calling, and server APIs from Nexconn.
- [Release notes](/chatui-ios/release-notes.md): Review the latest Chat UI SDK for iOS release notes, including capabilities and upgrade notes.
- [Group channel overview](/chatui-ios/user/group-overview.md): Group channels enable multi-user communication in instant messaging applications, typically involving two or more users. NEXCONN group channel service provides rich member management and mute features, supports offline message push and historical message roaming, and is suitable for interest groups, work teams, and customer service scenarios. Chat UI offers ready-to-use group channel UI components.
- [User overview](/chatui-ios/user/overview.md): App users must connect to NEXCONN services to use instant messaging. In NEXCONN, a user is any app user who holds a valid access token and uses the instant messaging service.
- [User information](/chatui-ios/user/userinfo.md): Chat UI uses the managed information service by default to display user, group, and group member information in the channel list, chat page, group info page, and @mention selection page. In the default mode, you don't need to implement app-side profile data sources.

## Chat UI SDK for Web

- [ChatUI for Web](/chatui-web.md): Overview of ChatUI for Web on Nexconn Chat and Engine: supported channel types, capability matrix, customization model, and integration with frameworks.
- [Channel management](/chatui-web/chat/manage-conversation.md): getOpenedChannel, openChannel with DirectChannelIdentifier, GroupChannelIdentifier, and SystemChannelIdentifier, and channel header extensions.
- [Message management](/chatui-web/chat/manage-message.md): sendMessage and insertMessage on NCChatUIApplication; keep UI in sync with Nexconn Chat.
- [Custom messages](/chatui-web/chat/register-message.md): registerCustomMessages with ChatUICustomMessageRegistration; Web Components and digest for en_US vs en_UK.
- [Channel list items](/chatui-web/chat-ui/channel-list.md): Customize channel list row styles with ChannelsItemConfig, cloneChannelsItemConfig, and setChannelsItemConfig.
- [Channel list menu](/chatui-web/chat-ui/conversation-menu.md): ChannelsMenuID, cloneChannelsMenu, setChannelsMenu, and CHANNELS_MENU_ITEM_CLICK in ChatUI SDK.
- [Input toolbar](/chatui-web/chat-ui/editor.md): Configure ChatUI input menu items and INPUT_MENU_ITEM_CLICK for custom actions.
- [Custom emoji](/chatui-web/chat-ui/emoji.md): Configure Unicode emoji tabs and image or GIF sticker libraries before ready() in ChatUI SDK.
- [Layout controls](/chatui-web/chat-ui/layout.md): Control the built-in Web chat shell with setChannelBarSwitch, setChannelDetailBackSwitch, and setChannelBarTitle.
- [Message bubbles](/chatui-web/chat-ui/message-bubble.md): MessageBubbleConfig and BubbleLayout; set before ready(); note redius spelling from SDK.
- [Message menu](/chatui-web/chat-ui/message-menu.md): MessageMenuID, cloneMessageMenu, setMessageMenu, and MESSAGE_MENU_ITEM_CLICK; i18n example with en_US and en_UK.
- [Feature switches](/chatui-web/chat-ui/switch.md): ChatUICommand with setCommandSwitch and getCommandSwitch before ready().
- [Components overview](/chatui-web/components.md): Web Components layout for ChatUI: provider tags, built-in message elements, and the custom-message tag prefix.
- [Event listeners](/chatui-web/event.md): Listen to ChatUIEvents on NCChatUIApplication, and use preventDefault, stopImmediatePropagation, or sendResult where supported.
- [Localization](/chatui-web/localization.md): Configure default language, switch UI language, and register custom language packs for ChatUI SDK for Web.
- [Mobile push](/chatui-web/push.md): Use setPushConfigHook on NCChatUIApplication to customize push title and body before messages are sent.
- [Send your first message](/chatui-web/quickstart.md): Integrate ChatUI SDK for Web with npm or pnpm, initialize Nexconn Chat and ChatUI, connect, and show the chat UI.
- [Release notes](/chatui-web/release-notes.md): ChatUI SDK for Web version history, package versions, and migration notes.
- [Group overview](/chatui-web/user/group-overview.md): Group channels in ChatUI: server-managed lifecycle and ServiceHooks for member display data.
- [Hooks](/chatui-web/user/hooks.md): ServiceHooks for reqUserProfiles, reqGroupProfiles, reqSystemProfiles, and reqGroupMembers in ChatUI SDK.
- [User overview](/chatui-web/user/overview.md): Tokens, registration, and profiles for Nexconn Chat with ChatUI SDK; profiles come from ServiceHooks.
- [Data updates](/chatui-web/user/update.md): updateUserProfile, updateGroupProfile, updateUserOnlineStatus, and group member APIs after ready().

## Platform Chat API

- [Getting started](/platform-chat-api.md): Get started with Nexconn Platform Chat API, including authentication, request format, key concepts, and your first API call.
- [Remove channels from a tag](/platform-chat-api/channel/channel-tag/conversation-tag-del.md): Removing channels from a tag in Nexconn Platform Chat API for channels, with request and response details.
- [List channels in a tag](/platform-chat-api/channel/channel-tag/conversation-tag-get.md): Listing channels in a tag in Nexconn Platform Chat API for channels, with request and response details.
- [Add channels to a tag](/platform-chat-api/channel/channel-tag/conversation-tag-set.md): Adding channels to a tag in Nexconn Platform Chat API for channels, with request and response details.
- [Channel tags overview](/platform-chat-api/channel/channel-tag/tag-overview.md): Overview of channels in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including available capabilities and related integration workflows.
- [Delete user channel tags](/platform-chat-api/channel/channel-tag/user-conversation-tag-del.md): Deleting user channel tags in Nexconn Platform Chat API for channels, with request and response details.
- [List user channel tags](/platform-chat-api/channel/channel-tag/user-conversation-tag-get.md): Query all channel tags created by a specified user, including tag IDs, names, and creation times with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Create user channel tags](/platform-chat-api/channel/channel-tag/user-conversation-tag-set.md): Creating user channel tags in Nexconn Platform Chat API for channels, with request and response details.
- [Get channel attributes](/platform-chat-api/channel/conversation-attr-get.md): Retrieve all attributes of a specific channel, including tag information, pin status, and do-not-disturb settings.
- [Pin a channel](/platform-chat-api/channel/top.md): Pin a channel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for channels, with request and response details.
- [Status codes](/platform-chat-api/code.md): Reference Nexconn Platform Chat API status codes to understand HTTP and business return codes and troubleshoot API failures.
- [Change subchannel type](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/change-channel-type.md): Changing subchannel type in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Create a subchannel](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/create-channel.md): Creating a subchannel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Create a channel](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/create-community-channel.md): Creating a community channel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Delete a subchannel](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/delete-channel.md): Deleting a subchannel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Dismiss a channel](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/dismiss-community-channel.md): For client developers, dismissing a community channel only requires interacting with your app backend with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Do not disturb overview](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/do-not-disturb/do-not-disturb-about.md): Overview of community channels in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including available capabilities and related integration workflows.
- [List subchannels](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/get-channel-list.md): Retrieve the list of subchannels in a specified community channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Join a channel](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/join-community-channel.md): Joining a community channel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Add allowed senders](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/mute/add-to-global-ban-whitelist.md): Add one or more community channel members to the allowed senders list for a specified community channel or subchannel.
- [Overview](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/mute/ban-service-about.md): Overview of community channels in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including available capabilities and related integration workflows.
- [Mute members](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/mute/ban-user.md): Mute one or more users in a specified community channel, a specific subchannel, or across all subchannels.
- [List muted members](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/mute/query-banned-user-list.md): Retrieve the list of muted users in a specified community channel or subchannel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Get freeze status](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/mute/query-global-ban.md): Query the freeze status for a specified community channel or subchannel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [List allowed senders](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/mute/query-global-ban-whitelist.md): Retrieve the allowed senders list for a specified community channel or subchannel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Remove allowed senders](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/mute/remove-from-global-ban-whitelist.md): Removing from allowed senders list in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Freeze a channel](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/mute/set-global-ban.md): Set the freeze status for a specified community channel or subchannel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Unmute members](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/mute/unban-user.md): Unmute one or more users in a specified community channel or subchannel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Overview](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/overview.md): Get started with Nexconn Platform Chat API, including authentication, request format, key concepts, and your first API call.
- [Add private subchannel members](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/private-channel/add-to-private-channel-users.md): Add users to the private subchannel member list for a specified community channel subchannel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Change subchannel type](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/private-channel/change-channel-type.md): Changing subchannel type in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Remove private subchannel members](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/private-channel/delete-from-private-channel-users.md): Remove users from the private subchannel member list for a specified community channel subchannel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Query private subchannel members](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/private-channel/get-private-channel-users.md): Retrieve the private subchannel member list for a specified community channel subchannel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.

- [Query subchannels by user](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/private-channel/query-channel-by-user.md): Query the subchannels where a user is on the private subchannel member list, with pagination with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Check if the user is a member](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/query-member.md): Check whether a specified user is a member of a specified community channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Leave a channel](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/quit-community-channel.md): Leave a community channel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.

- [Add users to a user group](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/usergroup/add-user-to-usergroup.md): Adding users to a user group in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Bind subchannel to user groups](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/usergroup/bind-channel-to-usergroup.md): Bind one or more user groups to a specified community channel subchannel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Create user groups](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/usergroup/create-usergroup.md): Creating user groups in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Delete user groups](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/usergroup/delete-usergroup.md): Deleting user groups in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Query user groups by subchannel](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/usergroup/query-channel-bound-usergroup.md): Retrieve the list of user groups bound to a specified community channel subchannel with pagination with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [List user groups](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/usergroup/query-usergroup.md): Retrieve the list of user groups in a specified community channel with pagination with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Query subchannels by user group](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/usergroup/query-usergroup-bound-channel.md): Retrieve the list of subchannels bound to a specified user group with pagination with Nexconn Platform Chat API.

- [Remove users from a user group](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/usergroup/remove-user-from-usergroup.md): Removing users from a user group in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Unbind subchannel from user groups](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/usergroup/unbind-channel-from-usergroup.md): Unbind one or more user groups from a specified community channel subchannel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [User group overview](/platform-chat-api/community-channel/usergroup/usergroup-about.md): Overview of community channels in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including available capabilities and related integration workflows.
- [Mute or unmute a user in direct channels](/platform-chat-api/direct-channel/ban.md): Muting or unmute a user in direct channels in Nexconn Platform Chat API for direct channel.
- [List muted users in direct channels](/platform-chat-api/direct-channel/query-banned-list.md): Listing muted users in direct channels in Nexconn Platform Chat API for direct channel, with request and response details.
- [Explore APIs with Postman](/platform-chat-api/explore-api-with-postman.md): Use Postman to import the prebuilt Collection and environment, configure authentication, and send Nexconn Platform Chat API requests for debugging and testing.
- [Create a group channel](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-channels/create-group.md): Creating a group channel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [List group channel profiles](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-channels/list-group-channel-profiles.md): Listing group channel profiles in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [List group channels](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-channels/list-group-channels.md): Retrieve a paginated list of group channels under the current App Key with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [List groups a user has joined](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-channels/query-user-groups.md): Retrieve a paginated list of group channels that a specific user has joined with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Transfer group channel ownership](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-channels/transfer-group-channel-ownership.md): Transferring group channel ownership in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [Update group channel info](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-channels/update-group-info.md): Update the profile and permission settings for a group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Add favorite group channel members](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-member-profiles/add-favorite-group-members.md): Mark specified members as favorites for a user in a group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Delete a group channel alias](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-member-profiles/delete-group-alias.md): Delete the alias that a specified user has set for a group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Get a group channel alias](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-member-profiles/get-group-alias.md): Retrieve the alias that a specified user has set for a group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Get specific group channel members](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-member-profiles/get-specific-group-members.md): Retrieve member information for specified users in a group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [List favorite group channel members](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-member-profiles/list-favorite-group-members.md): Retrieve the favorite members that a specified user follows in a group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [List group channel members](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-member-profiles/query-group-members.md): Listing group channel members in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [Remove favorite group channel members](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-member-profiles/remove-favorite-group-members.md): Remove specified members from a user's favorites list in a group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Set a group channel alias](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-member-profiles/set-group-alias.md): Set the alias that a specified user sees for a group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Set a group channel member profile](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-member-profiles/set-group-member-profile.md): Update the nickname or extra information for a member in a group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Add group channel administrators](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-members/add-group-channel-admins.md): Promote specified group members to administrators in a group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Dismiss a group channel](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-members/dismiss-group.md): Dismissing a group channel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [Join a group channel](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-members/join-group.md): Joining a group channel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [Remove users from a group channel](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-members/quit-group.md): Removing users from a group channel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [Remove group channel administrators](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-members/remove-group-channel-admins.md): Remove administrator privileges from specified group members with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Remove a user from all group channels](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/managing-members/remove-user-from-all-group-channels.md): Remove a specified user from all group channels under the current App Key with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Add to allowed senders list](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/mute/add-to-group-ban-whitelist.md): Add one or more members to the allowed senders list of a specified group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Freeze a group channel](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/mute/ban-group.md): Freeze a group channel in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [Mute a group channel member](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/mute/gag-user.md): Muting a group channel member in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [Check group channel freeze status](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/mute/query-banned-state-or-list.md): Checking group channel freeze status in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [List muted members](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/mute/query-gagged-user.md): Retrieve the list of muted members in a specified group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Query allowed senders list](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/mute/query-group-ban-whitelist.md): Retrieve the allowed senders list for a specified group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Remove from allowed senders list](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/mute/remove-from-group-ban-whitelist.md): Remove one or more users from the allowed senders list of a specified group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Unfreeze a group channel](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/mute/unban-group.md): Unfreeze one or more group channels, restoring all members' ability to send messages with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Unmute a group channel member](/platform-chat-api/group-channel/mute/ungag-user.md): Unmuting a group channel member in Nexconn Platform Chat API for group channels, with request and response details.
- [Delete message metadata](/platform-chat-api/message/community-channel/delete-expansion.md): Delete metadata entries (key-value pairs) from a specified message by its message UID with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Get message metadata](/platform-chat-api/message/community-channel/get-expansion.md): Retrieve the metadata (key-value pairs) for a specified message by its message ID with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Update a community channel message](/platform-chat-api/message/community-channel/modify-message.md): Updating a community channel message in Nexconn Platform Chat API for community channels, with request and response details.
- [Search community channel messages](/platform-chat-api/message/community-channel/query-history-messages.md): Search community channel messages in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including structure, fields, and usage notes.
- [Send a community channel message](/platform-chat-api/message/community-channel/send-community-channel.md): Community channels include a default subchannel with ID RCDefault with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Set message metadata](/platform-chat-api/message/community-channel/set-expansion.md): The community channel message metadata feature allows you to add status indicators (key-value pairs) to messages.
- [Clear message history](/platform-chat-api/message/delete.md): Clear message history in Nexconn Platform Chat API for messaging, with request and response details.
- [Delete message metadata](/platform-chat-api/message/delete-expansion.md): Delete metadata from a sent message in a direct or group channel with Nexconn Platform Chat API.
- [Message metadata overview](/platform-chat-api/message/expansion-about.md): Overview of messaging in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including available capabilities and related integration workflows.
- [Get message metadata](/platform-chat-api/message/get-expansion.md): Getting message metadata in Nexconn Platform Chat API for messaging, with request and response details.
- [Sync messages to the sender](/platform-chat-api/message/how-to-sync-to-sender-client.md): Sync sent messages to the sender's client in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including structure, fields, and usage notes.
- [Message type overview](/platform-chat-api/message/message-about/about-message-types.md): Overview of message about in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including available capabilities and related integration workflows.
- [User content message format](/platform-chat-api/message/message-about/objectname.md): User content message format in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including structure, fields, and usage notes.
- [Signal message format](/platform-chat-api/message/message-about/objectname-callback.md): Signal message format in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including structure, fields, and usage notes.
- [Notification message format](/platform-chat-api/message/message-about/objectname-notification.md): Notification message format in Nexconn Platform Chat API, including structure, fields, and usage notes.
